$evals.prompt: Calculate the average report turnaround time for CT studies from our PACS. We want to know mean, median, and 90th percentile times from study completion to final signature.
$evals.expected: Returns structured metrics including mean (hours), median (hours), p90 (hours), with breakdown by time of day and urgency level.

$evals.prompt: Generate a productivity report for our radiology group covering the last month. Include studies read per radiologist, modality distribution, RVU estimates, and comparison to previous month.
$evals.expected: Comprehensive dashboard with individual and group metrics, trend analysis, and actionable insights.

$evals.prompt: Identify current backlog by modality and priority level. Which subspecialties have the longest pending queues and what's driving the delays?
$evals.expected: Backlog summary with contributing factors, time-in-queue analysis, and bottleneck identification.

$evals.prompt: Track our discrepancy rate over the past quarter. What types of errors are most common and which radiologists have elevated rates requiring peer review?
$evals.expected: Error categorization, trend data, statistical significance indicators, and peer review recommendations.

$evals.prompt: Analyze MRI utilization rates across our health system. Compare scheduled vs. completed rates, no-show patterns, and suggest capacity optimization opportunities.
$evals.expected: Utilization metrics with root cause analysis and quantified optimization recommendations.

$evals.prompt: Calculate our critical result communication compliance rate. Track time from finding identification to ordering physician notification for critical findings.
$evals.expected: Compliance metrics, escalation patterns, and process improvement suggestions.

$evals.prompt: Forecast imaging volumes for the next 6 months based on historical trends, seasonality, and scheduled protocol changes. Factor in new AI tool adoption.
$evals.expected: Forecasted volumes with confidence intervals, scenario planning, and staffing recommendations.

$evals.prompt: Compare cost-effectiveness of our outpatient CT protocols vs. industry benchmarks. Include per-study cost, image quality metrics, and downstream testing rates.
$evals.expected: Comparative analysis with actionable efficiency improvements and ROI projections.
